caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with the gold text "BOSS" and "TALK" on the chest sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a dark desk, facing toward the left of the frame with a slight smile. A professional condenser microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. To his right, a black container featuring red and white text that reads "NO TALK ONLY" is visible. The background consists of a white wall with a repeating gold logo that says "UNICORN HUSTLE" accompanied by five stars. Above him, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a static position, maintaining his expression and posture while looking off-camera, with no significant movement or change in the scene.
